query:
INSERT INTO teachers (userId, name, phone, teacherAttribute, status, notes, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  u.id as userId,
  u.name,
  u.phone,
  u.teacherAttribute,
  u.teacherStatus as status,
  u.teacherNotes as notes,
  NOW() as createdAt,
  NOW() as updatedAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN teachers t ON u.id = t.userId
WHERE u.roles LIKE '%teacher%' 
AND u.deletedAt IS NULL
AND t.id IS NULL;
